text:
Created attachment 189182
retroshare 0.6.3 diff

* More bugfixes for compilation with clang
* Update to RetroShare version 0.6.3

Tested with poudriere in FreeBSD 11 and 12 jails.

New files:
 * patch-libresapi_src_libresapi.pro
 * patch-libretroshare_src_util_cxx11retrocompat.h
 * patch-retroshare-gui_src_gui_elastic_fft.h
